creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
Would like to off-load maintenance of an internal patch, and thought others may benefit from this patch, as well. 

Per discussion with Christos Zoulas (circa 07/16/2009), provides
Crystal Reports definition for CDF Property name of application,
"x-rpt", and produces mime type output "application/x-rpts;
charset=binary".

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
